description: Print information about points. If < range > is not supplied, the requested information is listed for all points.
notes: Requires a current building-blocks set: run 'building-blocks set create <name>' then 'building-blocks set select <name>' before any block/edge/face/point operation; otherwise FLAC rejects the command with 'Unused extra parameter'.

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Print FISH extra information. A valid index i must be supplied.

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: Comprehensive information is listed, including groups and extras.

keywords.name: edges
keywords.description: Print IDs for the edges that are connected to the point(s).
